headline: PPH ETF: Drug Pricing Policy and Eli Lilly Concentration Are the Two Risks to Watch in 2026
summary: VanEck Pharmaceutical ETF (NYSEARCA:PPH) exists to give investors broad exposure to the global pharmaceutical industry without the binary risk of betting on a single drug pipeline. Right now, that diversification is being tested by two forces pulling in opposite directions: sweeping U.S. drug pricing policy and a dangerous level of concentration in one stock. The ... PPH ETF: Drug Pricing Policy and Eli Lilly Concentration Are the Two Risks to Watch in 2026

headline: Open Label Outpatient Switch Study Demonstrates Symptom Stability During Transition from Oral Atypical Antipsychotics to Cobenfy™ (xanomeline and trospium chloride)
summary: PRINCETON, N.J., March 28, 2026--Open Label Outpatient Switch Study Demonstrates Symptom Stability During Transition from Oral Atypical Antipsychotics to Cobenfy.
